code:
type Shape =
  | Circle(radius: Int)
  | Rectangle(width: Int, height: Int)

fn area(_ shape: Shape) -> Int
  match shape
  when Circle(radius: r)
    3 * r * r
  when Rectangle(width: w, height: h)
    w * h
  end
end

let circle = Shape.Circle(radius: 4)
let rect = Shape.Rectangle(width: 5, height: 6)

print("circle=#{area(circle)}")
print("rect=#{area(rect)}")
